active.description: Indicates whether the access token is valid and ready for use, or if reauthorization is required.

access_token.description: The OAuth access token for the connected integration.

expires_at.description: The ISO-8601 formatted timestamp indicating when the access token expires.

scopes.description: The scopes granted to the access token.

missing_scopes.description: If the integration has requested scopes that aren't present on the access token, they're listed here.

access_token.description: The [access token](/reference/pipes/access-token) object, present when `active` is `true`.

active.description: Indicates whether the access token is valid and ready for use, or if reauthorization is required.

error.description:
- `"not_installed"`: The user does not have the integration installed.
- `"needs_reauthorization"`: The user needs to reauthorize the integration.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.

404.description: Data integration not found for the given provider slug.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
